steps.t: Meregyth was last seen heading along the road south towards Beaconwatch. Thane Sparhafoc asked you to find Meregyth and watch over her.
Meregyth was last seen heading along the road south towards Beaconwatch. Thane Sparhafoc asked you to find Meregyth and watch over her.
The trail of flowers leads to the south. It is possible that Meregyth is leaving a trail in order to locate her. She may be in trouble after all. You …
The trail of flowers leads to the south. It is very clear that Meregyth is leaving a trail in order to locate her. She may be in trouble after all. Yo…
The trail of flowers goes off the road and runs adjacent to the stream. You should continue to follow Meregyth's trail.
The trail of flowers goes up a narrow path that leads behind the waterfall. You should follow the path that winds around the waterfall.
It is clear now that Meregyth was taken by the Orcs. You should find her and free her from the clutches of the Orcs.
